UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, JACK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KSYCINSKI, SUSAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: N, IT IS HEREBY ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED THAT DEFENDANT SUSAN KSYCINSKI SHALL HAVE JUDGMENT AGAINST AND RECOVER HER COSTS FROM PLAINTIFF JACK PATEL AND THAT PLAINTIFF JACK PATEL SHALL TAKE NOTHING REQUESTED IN THE COMPLAINT.
